name: 450 MG Pregabalin Capsules IP
about: 450 MG Pregabalin Capsules IP are general medicines sourced from India. Each box contains 10x15 capsules, with each capsule containing 450mg dosage of Pregabalin. The capsules are recommended to be taken as per the doctors suggestion. To maintain their efficacy, store the capsules in a dry and cool place.
